untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) price persistence over 5 periods in one direction (no momentum indicator captures directional persistence across N bars without array indexing), (2) confirmation that 'no major news/fundamental event' explains the move (no fundamental/news sentiment indicator available), and (3) identification of 'uninformed trader behavior patterns' and 'retail positioning' (no retail flow or order flow indicator in allowed list). The VIX percentile threshold (75th) is approximated with india_vix > 75, but this is a crude proxy for the full signal intent. Volume surge is translatable, but the core microstructure pattern recognition cannot be fully expressed.
translation_notes: Converted to use india_vix as proxy for sentiment/retail positioning confirmation. Volume multiplier translated to vol_ratio_20 > 1.5. Price persistence condition and fundamental event detection cannot be operationalized with allowed indicators. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal. Exit on 2% loss mapped to returns check. 10-period hold mapped to hold_days_max.
